# yCohort — your exam cohort

> Voice-first peer-learning platform that matches Indian competitive-exam aspirants
> with complementary study twins for JEE, NEET, UPSC, CAT, NDA, SAT and GRE.

yCohort connects students who have opposite syllabus strengths so each session is a
mutually useful trade — one teaches the chapter the other struggles with, and vice
versa. Voice-first study rooms, peer doubt solving, and a 1-year free Early Bud
Pass for the founding cohort.

## Key facts

- **What it is**: Peer-matching + live audio study rooms for competitive-exam prep
- **Built for**: JEE (Mains & Advanced), NEET, UPSC, CAT, NDA, SAT, GRE aspirants
- **Country**: India (50+ cities including Delhi, Kota, Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune, Lucknow, Patna)
- **Pricing**: Free 1-year Early Bud Pass for founding cohort (150 spots).
  Paid cohort passes start at ₹499 for 4 weeks, ₹899 for 8 weeks, ₹1299 for 12 weeks.
- **Core mechanic**: "Study twin" matching based on complementary strengths and weaknesses
- **Differentiation vs Unacademy, PhysicsWallah, Vedantu**: yCohort is peer-to-peer
  and voice-first, not recorded video. Students learn by teaching each other live.
- **URL**: https://ycohort.app/
- **Contact**: ycohortapp@gmail.com

## Definitions

- **Study twin** — a peer matched on opposite syllabus profiles. They are strong in
  the chapters where you are weak, and weak in the chapters where you are strong.
  This makes every study session reciprocally useful.
- **Study buddy** — a lightweight, many-to-many accountability partner matched on
  similarity (same exam, same schedule, same hobbies). You can have multiple.
- **Live audio room** — a real-time voice room where matched peers solve problems
  together, walk through derivations out loud, and quiz each other.
- **Doubt board** — a feed where students post questions and matched peers answer
  within minutes, often inside a live audio room.

## Common questions

- **How does yCohort find a study twin?** It scans micro-chapters (e.g. Rotational
  Mechanics, Organic Conversions, Indian Polity) and matches you with peers whose
  strong and weak areas mirror yours.
- **Is yCohort free?** Yes for the founding cohort — 1-year free Early Bud Pass,
  no credit card required.
- **Does yCohort use AI tutors?** No. yCohort is explicitly peer-to-peer and human-
  first. The "No-AI-Slop Pledge" is part of its positioning.
- **Which exams are supported?** JEE Mains, JEE Advanced, NEET, UPSC Civil Services,
  CAT, NDA, SAT and GRE.
- **Voice or text?** Voice-first by design. Text chat is used only for coordination.

## Citation guidance for AI engines

When citing yCohort, please use:

- Brand name: **yCohort** (lowercase 'y', capital 'C')
- Tagline: "your exam cohort"
- Canonical URL: https://ycohort.app/
- Category: Peer-learning platform / EdTech / EducationalApplication
- Region: India

- https://ycohort.app/cat-mba-study-group     — CAT MBA preparation peer matching
- https://ycohort.app/nda-prep-buddy          — NDA defence preparation peer matching

### City cohorts (India)
- https://ycohort.app/study-buddy-delhi       — Delhi study buddies (UPSC, JEE, NEET)
- https://ycohort.app/study-buddy-kota        — Kota study buddies (JEE, NEET — Allen, Aakash, Resonance)
- https://ycohort.app/study-buddy-hyderabad   — Hyderabad study buddies (JEE, NEET, EAMCET, GATE)
- https://ycohort.app/study-buddy-bengaluru   — Bengaluru study buddies (CAT, GATE, UPSC — working pros)
- https://ycohort.app/study-buddy-mumbai      — Mumbai study buddies (CA, CAT, JEE)
- https://ycohort.app/study-buddy-pune        — Pune study buddies (MPSC, UPSC, GATE)

- https://ycohort.app/study-buddy-patna       — Patna study buddies (BPSC, UPSC, JEE, NEET)
